data.title: Nine Entertainment adds WIN executive Chris Halios-Lewis to board
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Nine Entertainment Co. Holdings Limited ( (AU:NEC) ).

Nine Entertainment Co., a leading Australian media group spanning television and digital platforms, has been reshaping its portfolio to emphasise digital-first operations and has recently bolstered its market presence with the acquisition of QMS. The company’s network of affiliates, including WIN Corporation, and its major shareholders underpin a broad footprint across metropolitan and regional media markets.

Nine has appointed Chris Halios-Lewis, currently CFO and COO of regional affiliate WIN Corporation and CFO of major shareholder Birketu Pty Ltd, as a Non-Independent, Non-Executive Director to its board. With more than 25 years of media-focused finance and accounting experience, his appointment is expected to reinforce Nine’s strategic shift toward a digitally based media business and support efforts to drive further value creation for shareholders amid structural changes in the Australian media sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NEC) stock is a Hold with a A$0.92 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nine Entertainment Co. Holdings Limited stock, see the AU:NEC Stock Forecast page.

More about Nine Entertainment Co. Holdings Limited

Nine Entertainment Co. is a major Australian media company operating across television, digital platforms and related media services, with a strong presence in both metropolitan and regional markets. The group has been actively repositioning itself as a digitally focused media business, including recent expansion through the acquisition of outdoor advertising operator QMS, to strengthen its competitive standing in the evolving media landscape.

Through its affiliates such as WIN Corporation and key shareholders like Birketu Pty Ltd, Nine maintains deep links across regional broadcasting and advertising networks. This integrated structure supports the company’s strategy of leveraging traditional media assets while accelerating growth in digital and data-driven offerings across the Australian media market.

Average Trading Volume: 4,964,683

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$1.39B

data.title: HeraMED Wins Near-Unanimous Shareholder Backing at Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

HeraMED Ltd. ( (AU:HMD) ) has shared an announcement.

HeraMED Limited reported that shareholders overwhelmingly approved all resolutions put to an Extraordinary General Meeting held on 26 March 2026 in Melbourne. The passed resolutions included ratifications of prior share and option issues, approvals for new share and option issuances, and the granting of performance rights and options to related parties and advisors, each receiving more than 99% support on poll results.

The strong voting backing for these capital management and incentive measures consolidates HeraMED’s financial and governance settings as it advances its digital maternity care platform. High levels of shareholder approval for issuances to management, directors, and corporate advisors signal confidence in the company’s growth strategy and alignment between stakeholders and key executives in executing its health technology ambitions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:HMD) stock is a Hold with a A$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on HeraMED Ltd. stock, see the AU:HMD Stock Forecast page.

More about HeraMED Ltd.

HeraMED Limited is a medical data and technology company focused on digitally transforming maternity care through a hybrid prenatal and postpartum platform. Its proprietary HeraCARE ecosystem integrates the in‑home, clinically validated HeraBEAT fetal and maternal heart rate monitor with cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and big data to enhance engagement, lower costs, and support early risk detection for expectant mothers and clinicians.

YTD Price Performance: 8.33%

Average Trading Volume: 822,339

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$43.54M

data.title: Bourns Lifts Rakon Stake to Nearly 78% as Takeover Advances
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Rakon ( (NZ:RAK) ) has issued an update.

Bourns, Inc., a substantial product holder in Rakon, has continued increasing its stake through a full cash takeover offer launched in February at $1.55 per share. Following further acceptances from Rakon shareholders, Bourns now has a relevant interest in 178.9 million shares, representing 77.843% of Rakon’s ordinary shares.

The latest increase of 6.97 million shares since 24 March reflects a movement of more than 1% in Bourns’ holding, tightening its control over the NZX-listed company. Although the interest remains conditional on the offer becoming fully unconditional and settlements completing, the growing majority position signals Bourns’ advancing takeover and a likely change in Rakon’s ownership structure.

More about Rakon

Rakon Limited is a New Zealand-listed technology company that issues ordinary shares under ticker RAK on the NZX. The company operates in the electronics and frequency control sector, supplying precision components that are widely used in communications and related high-tech applications.

Average Trading Volume: 197,370

Current Market Cap: N$340.1M

Find detailed analytics on RAK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

OpenLearning reports that its AI-driven SaaS LMS platform is experiencing sustained expansion, with 16 consecutive quarters of annualised SaaS revenue growth and platform ARR reaching A$3.035 million at the end of the fourth quarter, up 30% year on year. data.title: Codeifai launches QuantumAI Secure post-quantum SaaS platform after AntennaTransfer acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

YPB Group Ltd. ( (AU:CDE) ) has shared an announcement.

Codeifai Limited has launched its QuantumAI Secure website and self-service platform, delivering post-quantum file transfer and payments capabilities via a SaaS model at quantumaisecure.com.au. The platform, built on lattice-based cryptography using the Kyber algorithm, offers quantum-secure payment gateways, file transfer with payment-locked access and two-factor authentication to protect sensitive documents and transactions across fintech, healthcare, legal and enterprise sectors.

The rollout follows Codeifai’s acquisition of the underlying QuantumAI Secure technology from Credissential’s AntennaTransfer business and is positioned as a major commercial milestone that enhances the company’s QR code-based trust and verification ecosystem. By combining its existing authentication and supply chain transparency tools with quantum-resilient transfer and transaction security, Codeifai aims to create an end-to-end, AI-enhanced, quantum-hardened trust layer and expand into new verticals such as defence, mining, agriculture and security infrastructure.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CDE) stock is a Hold with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on YPB Group Ltd. stock, see the AU:CDE Stock Forecast page.

More about YPB Group Ltd.

Codeifai Limited is an ASX-listed provider of high-margin, self-service SaaS platforms operating at the intersection of artificial intelligence, post-quantum cryptography and serialised data technology. Its solutions support clients in sectors including fintech, mining, healthcare, legal, government and digital content, using QR code-based authentication, supply chain transparency and data verification to help organisations engage, authenticate and scale securely.

Average Trading Volume: 4,339,433

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$8.74M

data.title: Brookside Energy Sets Out 2026 Growth, Scale and Capital Return Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Brookside Energy ( (AU:BRK) ) has issued an announcement.

Brookside Energy has released its March 2026 investor presentation outlining a strategy built around three pillars: growing production, building scale and returning capital to shareholders. The company highlights its independently assessed reserves as at 31 December 2025 and flags that these estimates, while prepared by petroleum engineers, remain subject to revision as new drilling and analysis data become available.

The presentation underscores that Brookside’s operational and financial outlook is exposed to commodity price volatility, regulatory changes and project execution risks, which could materially alter outcomes versus current expectations. Investors are cautioned that reserve and revenue estimates are inherently forward-looking and imprecise, implying that future development plans, cash flows and capital management initiatives may change, with potential impacts on valuation and stakeholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:BRK) stock is a Hold with a A$0.43 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Brookside Energy stock, see the AU:BRK Stock Forecast page.

More about Brookside Energy

Brookside Energy is a Mid-Continent focused oil and gas exploration and production company listed on the ASX, OTC Pink and NYSE American via ADRs. The company operates in the upstream energy sector, targeting the growth of hydrocarbon production and the development of reserves within its core U.S. onshore acreage positions.

data.title: InSilico Expands AI-Driven CNS Collaboration With Tenacia in USD94.75 Million Deal
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

InSilico Medicine Cayman TopCo ( (HK:3696) ) has shared an announcement.

InSilico Medicine has expanded its AI-driven research and development collaboration with Tenacia Biotechnology, a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on underserved neurological disorders. The partners will use generative AI to jointly develop an additional innovative molecule for challenging neurological diseases and advance it to the preclinical candidate stage to better address differentiated clinical needs.

The expanded agreement adds potential deal value of up to USD94.75 million, with InSilico Medicine eligible for near-term and milestone payments from Tenacia Biotechnology. The collaboration deepens InSilico’s push into central nervous system indications, supports risk mitigation in late-stage development, and underscores the commercial traction of its AI drug discovery platform with biopharma partners.

More about InSilico Medicine Cayman TopCo

InSilico Medicine Cayman TopCo is a global biotechnology company that integrates artificial intelligence and automation to accelerate drug discovery and innovation in life sciences. Listed on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 3696, it focuses on developing therapeutics for fibrosis, oncology, immunology, pain, obesity and metabolic disorders, while also applying its Pharma.AI platform to advanced materials, agriculture, nutritional products and veterinary medicine.

data.title: Vertex Minerals Director Roger Jackson Increases Shareholding via On-Market Purchase
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Vertex Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:VTX) ) just unveiled an update.

Vertex Minerals has disclosed a change in director Roger Jackson’s interests, with the executive increasing his holding in the company through an on-market share purchase. Jackson acquired 350,000 ordinary shares at $0.1421 each, lifting his direct and indirect shareholding to 1,818,428 shares while his existing listed options and unlisted performance rights remain unchanged.

The transaction, conducted via the RJ Consolidated Superannuation Fund as a related entity, did not involve any disposal of securities or changes to contractual interests. Vertex also confirmed that the trade did not occur during a closed period, indicating that no special trading clearances were required for this adjustment to the director’s stake.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:VTX) stock is a Sell with a A$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vertex Minerals Ltd. stock, see the AU:VTX Stock Forecast page.

Vertex Minerals Limited is an ASX-listed resources company focused on mineral exploration and development in Australia. The company’s activities centre on identifying and advancing mineral assets, with its securities including ordinary shares, listed options and unlisted performance rights traded on the Australian market.

Crowd Media Holdings Limited ( (AU:UNT) ) has shared an announcement.

UNITH has outlined its strategic positioning to capitalise on the rapid expansion of the Digital Human and Generative AI markets, which are forecast to grow from a single-digit billion-dollar segment today to potentially over US$100 billion in the next decade. The company is focusing on becoming an AI-native service delivery layer, enabling enterprises to embed AI into real-world workflows by addressing barriers such as trust, usability, and integration rather than simply providing access to AI models.

The group reported platform advances including the general availability of its Streaming Avatars, which enhance responsiveness, interaction quality, and commercial utility, and are already driving customer acquisition and expansion in training and support applications. UNITH is also nearing completion of ISO certification and building a new avatar library using multiple frontier AI models, steps that aim to strengthen its appeal to larger enterprise and institutional clients and support a shift toward outcome-oriented, service-focused deployments.

data.title: China First Capital Group Narrows Loss Despite Surge in Revenue and Rising Liabilities
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

China First Capital Group Ltd. ( (HK:1269) ) has issued an announcement.

China First Capital Group Limited reported a sharp 57.6% rise in revenue to RMB3.45 billion for the year ended 31 December 2025, reflecting strong top-line growth across its businesses. Total assets also increased 28.6% to RMB3.97 billion, though the group remains in a net liability position, with deficit in equity attributable to owners expanding to RMB2.13 billion.

Despite the revenue and asset growth, the company stayed loss-making, posting a reduced loss attributable to owners of RMB341.7 million, down 13.1% from the prior year, aided by improved gross profit and positive fair value changes in financial assets. However, elevated expected credit losses, finance costs, and increased operating expenses continue to weigh on profitability, underscoring ongoing balance-sheet pressure and risks for shareholders while hinting at gradual operational improvement.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1269) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.06 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China First Capital Group Ltd. stock, see the HK:1269 Stock Forecast page.

More about China First Capital Group Ltd.

China First Capital Group Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating primarily in sectors that generate revenue from sales and services in mainland China. The group’s activities involve revenue streams that require substantial cost of sales, research and development, and selling and distribution expenses, indicating a focus on operational and service-driven businesses.

Average Trading Volume: 985,914

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$83.16M
